image_description: A graph showing an inverse relationship between price and quantity demanded.
learning_objective: Understand the causal relationship described by the law of demand.

image_description: A graph showing the intersection of demand and supply curves at the equilibrium point.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and graphical representation of equilibrium level in economics.

image_description: A graph showing an upward-sloping supply curve, illustrating the positive relationship between price and quantity supplied.
learning_objective: Understand the causal relationship between price and quantity supplied as described by the law of supply.

image_description: A graph showing an upward-sloping supply curve with price on the y-axis and quantity supplied on the x-axis.
learning_objective: Understand the graphical representation of the law of supply.

image_description: A table with two columns labeled 'Price' and 'Quantity Demanded' with multiple rows of data.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and purpose of a demand schedule.

image_description: A graph showing a supply curve with price on the y-axis and quantity supplied on the x-axis.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and determinants of quantity supplied.

image_description: A graph showing a downward-sloping demand curve with price on the y-axis and quantity demanded on the x-axis.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and graphical representation of the demand curve.

image_description: A graph showing the intersection of supply and demand curves at the equilibrium point.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and graphical representation of equilibrium quantity.

image_description: A graph showing the relationship between price and quantity demanded on a demand curve.
learning_objective: Understand the definition and role of quantity demanded in economic analysis.

image_description: A graph showing the relationship between price and quantity supplied.
learning_objective: Understand the role of price in determining the supply of a good or service.
